githubDescription: Stop paying for the same AI mistake twice. ThumbGate blocks repeat hallucinations and known-bad tool calls before they reach the model — zero tokens spent on retry loops.
metaDescription: Frontier LLMs are expensive and repeat mistakes cost real money. ThumbGate blocks known-bad AI agent actions before they hit the model — zero tokens spent on retries, hallucinations, or repeat commands. Pre-Action Gates for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Amp, and OpenCode. Fix it once, your bill never sees it again.
